description: Fun, style and comfort are the highlights of this black handbag from fastrack. Carry it to college or on a casual day out with friends. A good looking bag with lots of space, it is sure to accommodate everything you think of, while you strut around looking super cool! Height: 41 cm Width: 32 cm Depth at base: 11 cm Made of nylon for enhanced durability Roomy zippered main compartment with organiser pouches and inner zipper for all your essentials A small zippered overlap pocket on the front and a zippered pocket at the back to stow away essentials One zip at the bottom to extend the bag space Brand tab appliqué d on the side Brand logo on the front Branded zippers and sliders for easy use Nylon bonded thread for long life Single adjustable strap for carrying ease Care Do not machine wash Rub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
